description: Lowest 5 scalar Helmholtz eigenvalues of the unit cube with homogeneous Dirichlet BC, on a programmatic cube_tet_mesh of n=4 (27 interior DOFs). JAX baseline ships in #93 in parallel with #92's NumPy canonical baseline; values are cross-checked at fixture-gen time.

n.description: Cells per side of the programmatic cube_tet_mesh.

eigenvalues.description: Lowest 5 eigenvalues, ascending. Cross-language f64 reproducibility allows ~1e-5 relative drift per #88 framing; this fixture uses 1e-8 absolute since the in-tree NumPy and JAX values agree to ~1e-13.

k_diag_sum.description: trace(K_int) — interior-DOF stiffness diagonal sum; autodiff anchor.

provenance.verified_against: reference/numpy/cube_cavity_minimal.py — eigenvalues agree to 7.8e-15 relative at fixture-gen time
